desc: Wire terminal brief enrichment into orient so agents at term nodes get completion evidence, gap analysis, and handoff context before writing successor specs.

restore-computed-report.desc: Restore completion evidence computation. Rebuild a lightweight computeReport() in src/lib/terminal-audit/computed.ts that reads .roadmap/completed.json and returns: per-node commit status (produces, gitSha, completedAt, missing artifacts), test evidence (shell validator results), audit trail (checksTotal, checksPassed, checksFailed per node). No gate logic, no pass/fail — pure data assembly. This was deleted in the hygiene sweep but the data is needed for terminal brief enrichment.

restore-gap-detection.desc: Restore gap detection. Rebuild a lightweight detectGaps() in src/lib/terminal-audit/detected.ts that reads the DAG and returns: uncovered consumes (consumed but no predecessor produces it with a shell validator), untested produces (produced but no validator references it). No gate, no prompt generation, no scope-leak — just the two mechanical gap types. This was deleted in the hygiene sweep but gap data is needed for terminal brief enrichment.

enrich-terminal-brief.desc: Update buildTerminalBrief() in src/lib/terminal-brief.ts to use restored computed report and gap detection. TerminalBrief interface should include: rootIntent (dag.desc), iteration (from chain), completionEvidence (from computeReport), handoffSummaries (from .roadmap/.handoff/), detectedGaps (from detectGaps), chainHistory (from chain.jsonl). This is the full context an agent needs to write a good successor spec.

wire-orient-terminal-brief.desc: Wire terminal brief into orient's getBrief(). In src/lib/brief.ts, detect when position === dag.term. When true, call buildTerminalBrief() and merge its fields into the Brief output as a terminalContext field. The agent at the terminal node sees everything it needs to write a successor spec: completion evidence, gaps, handoffs, chain history, root intent. This is the key fix — moving enrichment from advance-time to orient-time.

test-terminal-enrichment.desc: Integration tests: (1) orient returns terminalContext in brief when position is the term node, (2) terminalContext includes completionEvidence with per-node status, (3) terminalContext includes detectedGaps with uncovered-consume and untested-produce types, (4) terminalContext includes handoffSummaries, (5) non-terminal nodes do NOT get terminalContext, (6) buildTerminalBrief works with empty completed.json (fresh DAG).

term.desc: Terminal — orient enriches terminal node briefs with completion evidence, gap analysis, and handoff context. Agents at term see everything needed to write successor specs.
